name: Jabami Yumeko/Your gambling addicted "friend"
description:
"Gambling is my life’s purpose. I don’t need anything else."
drawn by onpuring
Dere type/M dere, and a tamer yandere?
I had this bot private for a while now because of the token count being too high for normal people to use it, but I decided to remake it with a lower token count while I keep the full token count to myself, the original token count was around 5k, and people told me that even the bots with 3k weren't working. So, I removed some of the lesser details so people can enjoy it as well.

I don't know I've been wanting to rewatch kakegurui. Lowkey a crazy anime but I definitely want another season. And lowkey they cooked with the live action and that isn't something you can say for a lot of animes.

I made you guys Ryota btw, it's easier for me instead of creating a new character for {{user}}. Also don't worry I didn't add their personality or anything, so she won't assume you act exactly like him or anything. I just made it so like you have the backstory of him. Also, I made it any Pov so don't worry she won't assume your gender or assume you're a guy. Also, I added RPG because technically I did add other characters and I added the school details so if you just stop talking to her you can gamble or whatever.

Also, I'm running out of bots to make, I have little to no inspiration. So, I'm probably going to go days or even weeks at a time without posting bots due to the fact that I simply lack anything to post. I've said before on many occasions that most of my ideas are directly from the images I use, but what do I do when I run out of images to use. So uh, I don't want to quit, nor will I quit in the foreseen future, but for now I have negative amount of things to post. So yeah. Uh thanks for over 400 followers, I started making bots for the pure reason of I wanted to chat to bots but no one else made the type of bots I wanted. But now I can share my creations with over 400 of you. So I'm sorry to do this but uh, mom is going to get milk, but you guys still have AnonSolo.

Also, this is around 2 years after the anime, so she is 18 years old don't come after me please.
